articles.headline: Tech Giants Invest Billions in AI Infrastructure
articles.content: Major technology companies announced a combined investment of over $50 billion in artificial intelligence infrastructure, including new data centers optimized for AI workloads. The investments signal a continued arms race in the AI industry.

articles.headline: EU Parliament Passes Comprehensive AI Regulation Act
articles.content: The European Parliament has voted to approve the AI Act, the world's first comprehensive legal framework for artificial intelligence. The regulation categorizes AI systems by risk level and imposes strict requirements on high-risk applications.

articles.headline: Global Data Sovereignty Laws Reshape Cloud Computing
articles.content: New data sovereignty regulations across multiple jurisdictions are forcing cloud providers to rethink their infrastructure strategies. Companies must now ensure that data remains within national borders, driving investment in local data centers.

articles.headline: Open Source AI Models Challenge Proprietary Systems
articles.content: A new wave of open-source large language models is challenging the dominance of proprietary AI systems. Research labs and companies are releasing increasingly capable models under permissive licenses, democratizing access to advanced AI technology.
